svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="十轮并行头脑风暴的十个视角" id="ten-rounds"> <mxGraphModel dx="-469" dy="-176" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="十个独立视角同时审视同一命题,逼出研发看不见的盲区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="560" x="220" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CORE" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="同一个需求
命题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="430" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="1 业务闭环
链路走得通吗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="2 技术可行
现有架构做得了吗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="250" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="3 多租户隔离
数据会不会串租户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="460" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="4 安全合规
敏感信息 · 合规风险" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="670" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="5 性能容量
高并发扛得住吗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="6 运维发布
怎么发 · 怎么回滚" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="250" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="7 可观测性
出问题怎么排查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="460" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="8 架构对齐
和已有域冲突吗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="670" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="9 契约兼容
会不会破坏老版本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="180" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="10 风险依赖
有没有卡进度的外部依赖" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="620" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="落盘时只写综合结论,不写十轮辩论过程
过程是给 AI 看的,结论才是给人看的" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="300" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" edge="1" parent="1" source="V1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" edge="1" parent="1" source="V2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" edge="1" parent="1" source="V3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" edge="1" parent="1" source="V4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" edge="1" parent="1" source="V5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L6" edge="1" parent="1" source="V6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L7" edge="1" parent="1" source="V7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L9" edge="1" parent="1" source="V9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L10" edge="1" parent="1" source="V10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;startArrow=classic;" target="CORE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 460px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 十个独立视角同时审视同一命题,逼出研发看不见的盲区
